item.title: New OpenAI Academy courses for the next era of work
item.description: Focus: OpenAI introduces three Academy courses that help people build practical AI skills, create repeatable workflows, and apply agents in everyday work.

item.title: ‘Hard Fork’ Live, Part 1: Satya Nadella and Cindy Cohn
item.description: Focus: A tech titan, a digital rights defender and two menacing-looking robot dogs took the stage at our second-ever live show.

item.title: NVIDIA Blackwell Leads on First Agentic AI Infrastructure Benchmark
item.description: Focus: AgentPerf from Artificial Analysis, the industry’s first agentic AI benchmark, gives developers, enterprises and infrastructure providers a clear way to compare systems for agentic AI. In the first round of published results, the NVIDIA Blackwell Ultra NVL72 platform delivers leading performa

item.title: olmo-eval: An evaluation workbench for the model development loop
item.description: Focus: Hugging Face Blog has a new AI-related update around 'olmo-eval: An evaluation workbench for the model development loop', relevant to product, industry or technical direction.

item.title: How Preply combines AI and human tutors to personalize learning
item.description: Focus: Preply uses OpenAI to launch AI-generated lesson summaries, providing personalised feedback and language learning exercises.

item.title: Alex Imas and Phil Trammell – What remains scarce after AGI?
item.description: Focus: “One robot now turns into many robots next year, but the number of ballerinas is the same.”

item.title: Father of the iPod and iPhone on building taste, judgment, and creativity in the AI era | Tony Fadell
item.description: Focus: Lenny's Podcast is covered in a new interview or podcast. The core topic is 'Father of the iPod and iPhone on building taste, judgment, and creativity in the AI era | Tony Fadell', useful for tracking executive views, AI strategy and product direction.

item.title: #492 – Rick Beato: Greatest Guitarists of All Time, History & Future of Music
item.description: Focus: Rick Beato is a music educator, interviewer, producer, songwriter, and a true multi-instrument musician, playing guitar, bass, cello & piano. His incredible YouTube channel celebrates great musicians & musical ideas, and helps millions of people fall in love with great music all over again. T

item.title: #490 – State of AI in 2026: LLMs, Coding, Scaling Laws, China, Agents, GPUs, AGI
item.description: Focus: Nathan Lambert and Sebastian Raschka are machine learning researchers, engineers, and educators. Nathan is the post-training lead at the Allen Institute for AI (Ai2) and the author of The RLHF Book. Sebastian Raschka is the author of Build a Large Language Model (From Scratch) and Build a Rea

item.title: The mistake of conflating intelligence and power
item.description: Focus: f this is your definition of intelligence is the ability to achieve your goals across a wide variety of domains, then Stalin was the most intelligent person who ever lived.

item.title: Notes on pretraining parallelisms and failed training runs.
RLVR might be disproportionately bad at science
item.description: Focus: the verification loop for theories can be on the order of decades and centuries, and even then we know today as the better theory can often actually make worse predictions

item.title: 🧠 Community Wisdom: Bootstrapping vs. raising funding, building the roadmap of your vibe-coded app, AI agents and data integrity, your first project as an APM, and more
[AINews] not much happened today
item.description: Focus: a quiet day of RSI.

item.title: Fast-tracking genetic leads to reverse cellular aging
item.description: Focus: Biologists use Co-Scientist to find novel factors that successfully rejuvenate human cells.

item.title: The sample efficiency black hole
item.description: Focus: "We see these AIs as a galaxy glittering with capabilities, but at their center, invisible to the naked eye, holding all the constellations together, is an unimaginably massive black hole of data."

item.title: 🎙️ How I AI: Gemini Omni: Clone yourself with AI in under 15 minutes & Shopping with Claude
item.description: Focus: Your weekly listens from How I AI, part of the Lenny’s Podcast Network

item.title: Measuring the impact of learning with AI in Sierra Leone and beyond
item.description: Focus: Results from a randomized controlled trial show the potential of Gemini’s Guided Learning feature to boost engagement and accelerate learning.
